name: Obsidian Oversized Tee
description: A heavyweight 320gsm cotton tee cut for an oversized silhouette. Drop shoulders, ribbed collar, and a subtle chest logo in tonal ink. The kind of piece you reach for every time.

name: Linen Wide-Leg Trousers
description: Relaxed wide-leg trousers in a premium linen-cotton blend. Elasticated waistband, side pockets, and a clean front seam. Tailored enough for dinner, relaxed enough for everything else.

name: Arc Bomber Jacket
description: A structured bomber in satin-finish nylon with clean arc stitching across the back. Ribbed cuffs and hem, inner mesh lining. Statement outerwear that means business.

name: Minimal Crewneck Sweat
description: Medium-weight fleece-backed sweatshirt with a clean crewneck collar. No graphics, no noise — just excellent construction and a perfect boxy fit.

name: Canvas Cargo Shorts
description: Six-pocket cargo shorts in washed canvas. Slightly tapered leg, button fly, and a subtle tonal logo patch at the thigh. Utility with restraint.

name: Signature Cap
description: 6-panel structured cap in washed twill. Embroidered 'NT' logo on the front panel, adjustable strap at the back. The finishing touch.

name: Void Hoodie
description: Heavyweight 400gsm French terry hoodie. Kangaroo pocket, double-lined hood, and raw-edge seam detailing. Available in void black — our darkest dye lot.

name: Thread Tote
description: Heavy canvas tote with reinforced handles and an internal zip pocket. Screenprinted NAIRA THREADS wordmark on the face. Carries everything.
